English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Course and Time Rosters and Course and Room Rosters
Cornell University. University Registrar
36-1-4211
1 cubic feet. 1 cubic feet.
1976-2008. Printed Materials. Course and time rosters and course and room rosters published in the fall and spring semesters and also Summer session. Rosters also include academic and examination calendars as well as course instructor. Collection material in English 9222465
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
September 2018
EAD encoding:
Ben Wrubel, September 2018
Date modified:
RMC Staff, September 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Course and time rosters and course and room rosters published in the fall and spring semesters and also Summer session. Rosters also include academic and examination calendars as well as course instructor.
RELATED MATERIALS
RELATED MATERIALS
SERIES LIST
Series I. Course and Time Rosters and Course and Room Rosters
Cite As:
Cornell University Course and Time Rosters, #36-1-4211. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cornell University -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Degrees.
